hero.title: Digital solutions for Africa
hero.subtitle: AllihTech supports public and private institutions in their digital transition with tailored, modern, and secure solutions.

about.title: Technological innovation driving African development
about.text: AllihTech is a Chadian technology company founded on the belief that Africa deserves world-class digital solutions. We combine local expertise with international standards to deliver projects that permanently transform organizations.

services.title: Solutions tailored to every need
services.subtitle: From strategy to execution, we cover your entire digital transformation journey.

digital.desc: Strategic support to modernize your processes and information systems.

dev.desc: Custom web and mobile applications built with the latest technologies.

training.desc: Certified training programs to develop your teams' digital skills.

consulting.title: Strategic Consulting
consulting.desc: Audit, analysis and recommendations to optimize your information system.

cloud.title: Cloud Infrastructure
cloud.desc: Deployment, migration and management of secure, high-performance cloud infrastructure.

ai.title: Artificial Intelligence
ai.desc: AI solution integration to automate and optimize your business operations.

ceo.quote: Our mission is to harness technology in service of African progress. Every solution we deliver contributes to building a more competitive, efficient, and globally connected Chad.
